calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT
Off Calendar Aug-05-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brent Kato for Mark Brunig.

Counsel presented oral argument to support his position with regard to his fee request, the time entries Mr. Boessenceker related to Mr. Silvers fee request. Mr. Kato also stated that Hanson and Bridget only represented Creditors, and that he expects to have the letters from Bute County by today or tomorrow. The accounting petition was taken under submission pending reciept of the letters. If not forthcoming in a week or two, the matter will be added back on calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/J. Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT
Off Calendar Jul-01-2013 Continued To Jul-22-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Directing Transfer And Conveyance Of Estate Real Property; And To Quiet Title.
Off Calendar Feb-14-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Boessenecker for Mark Brunig (Petitioner).

The Court stated that it received the Proof of Service from the Secretary of The State. The Court granted the Petition for Order Directing Transfer and Conveyance of Estate Real Property (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Judge: Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.

Petition For Order Directing Transfer And Conveyance Of Estate Real Property; And To Quiet Title.
Off Calendar Jan-11-2012 Continued To Jan-31-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Directing Transfer And Conveyance Of Estate Real Property; And To Quiet Title.
Off Calendar Nov-02-2011 Continued To Jan-11-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Boessenecker for Mark Brunig.

The Court the Order Approving Service on The Seceratary of The State in open Court. The Petition for Order Directing Transfer and Conveyance of Estate Property, etc. was continued to January 11, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.
